requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — DTI-BPS (PNS IEC 62368-1 / RA 7394) — 220 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——DTI-BPS（PNS IEC 62368-1 / RA 7394）——220V / 60Hz / A/B型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——DTI-BPS（PNS IEC 62368-1 / RA 7394）——220 V / 60 Hz / A/B型插頭

summary.en: Consumer electronics and information technology equipment sold in the Philippines must comply with electrical safety requirements under Republic Act 7394 (Consumer Act of the Philippines), enforced by the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI). The Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) under DTI publishes Philippine National Standards (PNS) that adopt IEC international standards, including PNS IEC 62368-1 (Audio / Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment Safety). BPS-accredited laboratories or DOST-ITDI (Department of Science and Technology — Industrial Technology Development Institute) are recognised testing bodies. Importers and distributors are responsible for ensuring products meet PNS safety requirements before sale. A Philippines-specific power environment consideration: the Philippines operates at 220–240 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B (US-style flat-blade) plugs. This is an unusual combination globally — most 220 V markets use 50 Hz and Type C/E/F plug types, not 60 Hz / Type A/B. Chinese devices are typically designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with GB/T 1002 two-round-pin plugs. While the voltage broadly matches, the 60 Hz frequency and Type A/B plug type require specific attention. Wide-input (100–240 V, 50–60 Hz) power adapters are generally compatible in terms of frequency, but a plug adapter or replacement Type A/B-compatible power cord is required for devices shipped with Chinese standard plugs. Safety certification testing at DTI-BPS accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratories under PNS IEC 62368-1 conditions (including 60 Hz) is mandatory for Philippine market access.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的消费电子和信息技术设备须依据《共和国法案7394》（菲律宾消费者法）满足电气安全要求，由贸工部（DTI）强制执行。DTI下属菲律宾标准局（BPS）发布采用IEC国际标准的菲律宾国家标准（PNS），包括PNS IEC 62368-1（视听、信息及通信技术设备安全）。BPS认可实验室或DOST-ITDI（科技部工业技术开发研究所）为认可检测机构。进口商和分销商负责确保产品在销售前符合PNS安全要求。菲律宾特有的电源环境考量：菲律宾采用220–240 V / 60Hz及A/B型（美式扁脚）插头。这是全球罕见的组合——大多数220 V市场使用50Hz及C/E/F型插头，而非60Hz / A/B型。中国设备通常为220 V / 50Hz设计，配有GB/T 1002两圆脚插头。虽然电压大体相同，但60Hz频率和A/B型插头需特别关注。宽电压（100–240 V，50–60 Hz）电源适配器在频率方面通常兼容，但配有中国标准插头的设备须备插头转换器或更换A/B型兼容电源线。须在DTI-BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室依据PNS IEC 62368-1条件（含60Hz）进行安全认证测试，这是菲律宾市场准入的强制要求。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的消費電子和資訊技術設備須依據《共和國法案7394》（菲律賓消費者法）滿足電氣安全要求，由貿工部（DTI）強制執行。DTI下屬菲律賓標準局（BPS）發布採用IEC國際標準的菲律賓國家標準（PNS），包括PNS IEC 62368-1（視聽、資訊及通信技術設備安全）。BPS認可實驗室或DOST-ITDI（科技部工業技術發展研究所）為認可測試機構。進口商和分銷商負責確保產品在銷售前符合PNS安全要求。菲律賓特有的電源環境考量：菲律賓採用220–240 V / 60 Hz及A/B型（美式扁腳）插頭。這是全球罕見的組合——大多數220 V市場使用50 Hz及C/E/F型插頭，而非60 Hz / A/B型。中國設備通常為220 V / 50 Hz設計，配有GB/T 1002兩圓腳插頭。雖然電壓大體相同，但60 Hz頻率和A/B型插頭需特別關注。寬電壓（100–240 V，50–60 Hz）電源適配器在頻率方面通常相容，但配有中國標準插頭的設備須備插頭轉換器或更換A/B型相容電源線。須在DTI-BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室依據PNS IEC 62368-1條件（含60 Hz）進行安全認證測試，這是菲律賓市場准入的強制要求。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 7394 — Consumer Act of the Philippines (electrical safety and product standards enforcement by DTI / BPS)
PNS IEC 62368-1 — Audio / Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment Safety (Philippine National Standard adopting IEC 62368-1)
Philippine power standard: 220–240 V / 60 Hz, Type A/B plugs (per Philippine Electrical Code; Energy Regulatory Commission / DOE standards)
BPS Accreditation Program — BPS-accredited and DOST-ITDI laboratories for mandatory PNS safety testing
DTI Department Administrative Orders on mandatory product standards for consumer electronics (applicable category orders)

summary.en: Chinese consumer electronics and IT equipment safety is governed by GB 4943.1 (Information Technology Equipment Safety, aligned with IEC 60950-1) or the newer GB 4943.23 / GB 4943 series aligned with IEC 62368-1, enforced through CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA. CCC safety testing is conducted at CBTL or CNAS-accredited laboratories at 50 Hz operating conditions. Chinese devices are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with GB/T 1002 two-round-pin (Type A/C variation) or GB 2099.1 plugs. Chinese CCC safety certification and GB-standard test reports are not recognised by Philippine DTI-BPS and do not substitute for PNS IEC 62368-1 conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国消费电子和IT设备安全受GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，与IEC 60950-1对标）或与IEC 62368-1对标的较新GB 4943.23 / GB 4943系列标准管辖，通过CNCA主管的CCC（中国强制认证）强制执行。CCC安全测试在CBTL或CNAS认可实验室于50Hz运行条件下进行。中国设备为220 V / 50Hz设计，配有GB/T 1002两圆脚（A/C型变体）或GB 2099.1插头。中国CCC安全认证及GB标准测试报告不被菲律宾DTI-BPS承认，不能替代PNS IEC 62368-1符合性评定。
summary.zht: 中國消費電子和IT設備安全受GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，與IEC 60950-1對標）或與IEC 62368-1對標的較新GB 4943.23 / GB 4943系列標準管轄，通過CNCA主管的CCC（中國強制認證）強制執行。CCC安全測試在CBTL或CNAS認可實驗室於50 Hz運行條件下進行。中國設備為220 V / 50 Hz設計，配有GB/T 1002兩圓腳（A/C型變體）或GB 2099.1插頭。中國CCC安全認證及GB標準測試報告不被菲律賓DTI-BPS承認，不能替代PNS IEC 62368-1符合性評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1) — CCC mandatory
GB 4943.23 / GB 4943 series — aligned with IEC 62368-1 (newer editions)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety scope under CNCA; CBTL / CNAS lab testing at 50 Hz
Chinese power standard: 220 V / 50 Hz, GB/T 1002 two-round-pin or GB 2099.1 plugs (Type A/C variation)
GB/T 2099.1 — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes (Chinese standard)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification and GB 4943 test reports are not recognised by Philippine DTI-BPS and do not satisfy PNS IEC 62368-1 requirements. PNS-standard safety testing at a BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory is required for Philippine market access. The primary practical gap is the power environment: the Philippines uses 220–240 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B (flat-blade) plugs, while China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with round-pin plugs. Exporters must: (1) verify that device power adapters are rated for 100–240 V and 50–60 Hz wide-input; (2) include a Type A/B-compatible power cord or plug adapter, as Chinese GB-style round-pin plugs will not fit Philippine Type A/B sockets without adaptation; and (3) conduct PNS IEC 62368-1 safety testing at 60 Hz operating conditions, as 50 Hz-only Chinese CCC safety test data may not be accepted.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证及GB 4943测试报告不被菲律宾DTI-BPS承认，不满足PNS IEC 62368-1要求。菲律宾市场准入要求在BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室进行PNS标准安全测试。主要实际差距在于电源环境：菲律宾使用220–240 V / 60Hz及A/B型（扁脚）插头，而中国使用220 V / 50Hz及圆脚插头。出口商须：（1）核验设备电源适配器额定值为100–240 V和50–60 Hz宽电压；（2）随附A/B型兼容电源线或插头转换器，因为中国GB式圆脚插头若不适配则无法插入菲律宾A/B型插座；（3）在60Hz运行条件下进行PNS IEC 62368-1安全测试，仅在50Hz条件下的中国CCC安全测试数据可能不被接受。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證及GB 4943測試報告不被菲律賓DTI-BPS承認，不符合PNS IEC 62368-1要求。菲律賓市場准入要求在BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室進行PNS標準安全測試。主要實際差距在於電源環境：菲律賓使用220–240 V / 60 Hz及A/B型（扁腳）插頭，而中國使用220 V / 50 Hz及圓腳插頭。出口商須：（1）核驗設備電源適配器額定值為100–240 V和50–60 Hz寬電壓；（2）隨附A/B型相容電源線或插頭轉換器，因為中國GB式圓腳插頭若不適配則無法插入菲律賓A/B型插座；（3）在60 Hz運行條件下進行PNS IEC 62368-1安全測試，僅在50 Hz條件下的中國CCC安全測試數據可能不被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PNS IEC 62368-1 electrical safety conformity required under Republic Act 7394 and DTI-BPS product safety framework; BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing at 60 Hz required; 220–240 V / 60 Hz Type A/B plug environment must be addressed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4943.1 / GB 4943 series safety compliance required; CCC for applicable product categories under CNCA; 220 V / 50 Hz GB round-pin plug standard; 50 Hz test conditions apply

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) — Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine PNS IEC 62368-1 electrical safety is mandatory for consumer electronics under Republic Act 7394 and DTI-BPS enforcement. Chinese CCC and GB 4943 safety documentation are not recognised substitutes. BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing at 60 Hz conditions is required. Exporters must also address the Philippines' unique 220–240 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B plug environment: verify wide-input adapter rating (100–240 V, 50–60 Hz) and include a Type A/B-compatible power cord or plug adapter, as Chinese round-pin plugs are physically incompatible with Philippine Type A/B sockets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾PNS IEC 62368-1电气安全在《共和国法案7394》和DTI-BPS执法框架下对消费电子具有强制约束力。中国CCC和GB 4943安全文件不被视为等效替代。须在BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室于60Hz条件下进行测试。出口商还须应对菲律宾独特的220–240 V / 60Hz / A/B型插头环境：核验宽电压适配器额定值（100–240 V，50–60 Hz），并随附A/B型兼容电源线或插头转换器，因为中国圆脚插头与菲律宾A/B型插座在物理上不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓PNS IEC 62368-1電氣安全在《共和國法案7394》和DTI-BPS執法框架下對消費電子具有強制約束力。中國CCC和GB 4943安全文件不被視為等效替代。須在BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室於60 Hz條件下進行測試。出口商還須應對菲律賓獨特的220–240 V / 60 Hz / A/B型插頭環境：核驗寬電壓適配器額定值（100–240 V，50–60 Hz），並隨附A/B型相容電源線或插頭轉換器，因為中國圓腳插頭與菲律賓A/B型插座在物理上不相容。
